column2: TARUMT provides scholarships based on academic performance and financial need.
There are merit-based and need-based scholarships available at TARUMT.
You can apply for scholarships through the TARUMT student portal or admissions office.
Scholarship eligibility depends on academic results and financial background.
Scholarships usually require good academic results and sometimes financial need.

column2: Financial aid options for international students are limited but some scholarships may be available.

column2: Some scholarships and financial aid schemes can reduce tuition fees.

column2: The financial aid office is located at the campus student services center.
